Banshee Aura  

Description

1: Increase Damage Shield by 6 (L15) to 18 (L37)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 60 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 9.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: A shrieking aura surrounds you.
Cast on other: Soandso is surrounded by a shrieking aura.
Effect Fades: The shrieking aura fades.

Game Description

Surrounds your body with an aura of vengeful spirits, causing damage to anyone who strikes you for 4.0 mins @L15 to 15.0 mins @L70. Requires, but does not consume, a pearl when cast.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Banshee Aura

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Banshee Aura
Focus:
Pearl
ClassLevel
SHD54
NEC15
Expansion:

Duration:
4.0 mins @L15 to 15.0 mins @L70
  • Comments (33)
  • Sold By (6)
  • Quested (1)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Please update
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2015 at 8:21 AM Rating: Good
DarkVendetta
Guru
189 posts
At lv 105 I am using this spell. I checked with and without to verify dmg. the difference is 12 damage between having and not having this buff up. I do have max DS AA ( Intense Hatred rank 27) as well as 48/35 Damage shielding Mod. ( Damage was 452 without and 464 with, so yeah...)
So not sure what is going on with this spell but the info here needs to be updated and The Devs prolly need to rebalance a few things lol.

Edited, Dec 7th 2015 9:22am by DarkVendetta
____________________________
Hope you enjoy (This recipe is a trademark by Nightmares Inc., all rights reserved.) :-D
▲ Page top
Needs an update
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2011 at 10:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1710720969900
33 posts
The spell description is off. I'm 85 and mobs are taking 35 points of damage from this. I don't think there's a cap to it.

Needs an update
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2011 at 7:19 PM Rating: Decent

What does it do?
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2004 at 8:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780247998
8 posts
I am only really a level 4 but I dont get what this spell does... really what all does it do?
▲ Page top
RE: What does it do?
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2005 at 11:38 PM Rating: Decent
Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
This spell will damage your opponent in melee combat everytime they land a hit.

Edited, Sun Jan 23 23:38:35 2005
▲ Page top
Useless or Worthwhile Spell?
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2004 at 11:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776413860
21 posts
So is it worth a Damn to a Necro? I'd think being a caster and getting beat on was a NO-NO. Are there any Necro 's Out there that use this spell for any thing other than farming greens? I bought it anyway formy Baby Necro just because I try to always get my spells regardless.

Edited, Sat Aug 14 12:36:43 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Useless or Worthwhile Spell?
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2006 at 4:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591870300957
View User Forum
3 posts
Yar, especially for us necros that enjoy good old fasshioned one on one time with reds and are trading hits with your dear pet. Poor pets don't always seem to know what hit 'em when being hit and thier taunting isn't quite addequite enough. That is what I will be using it for.
▲ Page top
RE: Useless or Worthwhile Spell?
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2004 at 2:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
DS can be very effective for tanks. To an SK, even at 54, this can be useful since it adds DPS when a mob is hitting you. In addition, as the DS goes off it seems to add agro.
▲ Page top
RE: Useless or Worthwhile Spell?
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2004 at 11:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751526101
6 posts
I believe it is of some use at the lower levels (16 to 26ish) as you want to get slapped around a little bit in order to develope your defensive skills. It is also nice to max out your offence, 1H blunt etc, but those are more fringe benefits.

In my mind, this spell is just extra damage (thus xp) while you are working on defence and dodge. Against rapid hitting mobs (like iksar bandits/manslayers in WW), the damage from this shield can really add up. Just be sure to have leach up ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Useless or Worthwhile Spell?
QuoteReply
# May 08 2006 at 6:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592290867489
1 post
are you yoking me? (i believe its joking, with a soft j) i tank everything at teen levels, maybe cause im a twink, but still i use my shaded dagger and my pet is just extra dps, any extra dps i can have is fine, because my health just doesnt go down, even when im killing reds i just lifetap it back up :P
▲ Page top
RE: Useless or Worthwhile Spell?
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2006 at 11:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591878548697
4 posts
Really with the way necro spells are set up, and skills at earlier levels, tanking and letting the pet add DPS is a lot more effective. I think it was around 30 I stopped tanking and swapped to fear kiting, and not until the 50s did I start agro kiting.

▲ Page top
increase =)
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2003 at 5:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591785682270
33 posts
note that in the discription that it says increase damage shield by XX.... if grouprd with another class that can DS you, say a bard (who also adds to damage with both types they get) and a mage, druid or chanter this could get really big, especially at the level a SK gets it as you could be getting 25+ from base DS, another 18 or so from bard and 12 from yourself totaling around 45+ points a pop...
where's that quad hitting mod,,,Hmmmm heh.

be safe and good hunting


Edited, Wed Apr 9 05:39:23 2003
▲ Page top
RE: increase =)
QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 5:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256405593
158 posts
This spell does not stack with mage/druid ds's but does stack with protection line, druid line, cloak of akheva/luclin, baz's ring from chardok, 8th ring or better ds enhancement. So this is a regular ds not a ds enhancer..
▲ Page top
Sum it all up
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2003 at 10:57 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593362075520
9 posts
This spell is a Damage sheild. it damages the enemy IF it's hitting you. does 8 damage at lvl 16. it lasts for around 4 mins at that lvl. it DOES need a regent to cast which is a pearl. it will NOT consume it when cast. this spell can be researched or bought. cost is 9pp with 65 Cha bought off Nydill in POK. Great spell just remember to cast it before engageing in battle.
▲ Page top
I hate Allakhazam's Explainations
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 12:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768519780
69 posts
This spell makes a sheild that when a mob hits you it will take damage.

__DEL__1591783879081

I have been looking there for the spell for my necro and well i could be retarted but i CANT find the reaver that you speek of nor the spell. is it possible that the merchant was removed??
▲ Page top
RE: PoK Library
QuoteReply
# May 16 2004 at 3:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261127771
3 posts
He is at location -83, 760, -92
In the very bottom most level. What is confusing
is the bottom most level is split into 2 different
sections with different stairs down.
Both stairs are in the East wall but you
want the stairs in the south corner.
The stairs in the north corner take you
to the necro section instead.
▲ Page top
